features.title: Holidays & Birthdays Web Part
features.description: Displays upcoming holidays and birthdays from a SharePoint list

features.title: Holidays & Birthdays Dashboard Card
features.description: Adaptive Card Extension for Viva Connections dashboard showing upcoming holidays or birthdays

shortDescription.default: Display upcoming holidays and birthdays from a SharePoint list with support for annual recurrence and moving holidays

longDescription.default: Synozur Holidays and Birthdays is a SharePoint Framework solution that includes both a web part and Adaptive Card Extensions (ACEs) for Viva Connections dashboards. The web part displays upcoming holidays and birthdays from a SharePoint list with automatic list provisioning, support for annual recurrence (birthdays and fixed-date holidays), complex recurrence rules for moving holidays (e.g., Labor Day), and flexible display options with expandable views. The ACEs provide dashboard cards for displaying the next upcoming holiday or birthday with configurable options. For support, contact us at contactus@synozur.com.
